title: Quiz Result
description: Records the results of a completed quiz attempt including answers and scoring.

topicId.description: ID of the topic this quiz is associated with

chapterId.description: ID of the chapter this quiz is associated with (for chapter quizzes)

attemptNumber.description: Which attempt this is (1 = first attempt)

startTime.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the quiz started

endTime.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the quiz was submitted

timeSpentSeconds.description: Total time spent on the quiz in seconds

reviewedMissed.description: Whether the learner reviewed missed questions

answered.description: The learner's answer (string, boolean, or other depending on question type)

correctAnswer.description: The correct answer (included only for incorrect responses)

timeSpentSeconds.description: Time spent on this question in seconds
